name: file_explorer_desktop_startup
description: Startup artifact contract for the Finder-style desktop file explorer example.

require_debug_details.equals: Apple HIG Materials and Liquid Glass inspired portable tokens
Pretendard primary with platform sans fallback
pure material planner decides glass execution; theme provides portable tokens
Pretendard package default, OS font size metrics applied, user override wins
OS appearance and accent applied by default, user override wins
OS scroll deltas/line settings at edge, app can disable static OS scroll multipliers, axis theme multipliers are pure inputs
native edge captures OS settings before first frame and refreshes them at update-boundary theme sync
svg, g, path, rect, circle, ellipse, line, polyline, polygon
M L H V Q T C S A Z with absolute and relative variants
fill, stroke, color, opacity, fill-opacity, stroke-opacity, stroke-width, stroke-linecap, stroke-linejoin
circle elements and isolated circular path A/a preserve native ArcTo; chained or elliptical path A/a lowers to bounded cubic Bezier segments
Apple HIG, macOS Finder, and SF Symbols inspired custom rounded-outline SVG glyphs
semantic reference only; no Apple or SF Symbols vector artwork; embedded sources are audited permissive SVG
audited permissive vector assets; no Apple or SF Symbols artwork embedded
audited permissive SVG only; accepted external licenses include Lucide ISC, Feather-derived MIT, Tabler MIT, Iconoir MIT, and Apache-2.0 with per-symbol attribution
Prefer audited SVG from Lucide ISC or Feather-derived MIT, Tabler MIT, Iconoir MIT, or Material Symbols Apache-2.0 before phenotype adaptation

development-time import from pinned raw permissive SVG URLs only; runtime uses embedded SVG strings, does not fetch remote resources, and keeps platform icon extraction disabled unless redistribution rights are explicit and audited

embedded permissive SVG sources must expose family, icon name, exact license, pinned direct raw SVG URL, source revision, copyright, Apple-asset boundary, platform extraction flag, and runtime fetch flag in debug output
Apple SF Symbols, Finder icons, and macOS system icons are design references only; do not extract or embed Apple-owned artwork unless explicit redistribution clearance is recorded
primary, secondary, selected, accent, disabled, destructive
visual toolbar/navigation/action=36pt, sidebar=38pt, file_type=64pt; activation minimum=44pt for controls
